summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DEEPOTUS vault mechanics rework - all 24 tests passed with 100% success rate. Verified new production defaults, micro-rotations, treasury-based declassification logic, admin presets, and regression testing.
passed_tests: Production defaults correctly set (tokens_per_digit=100M, tokens_per_micro=10K, treasury_goal_eur=300K, eur_usd_rate=1.08)
GET /api/vault/state returns new fields: tokens_per_micro, micro_ticks_total, treasury_eur_value, treasury_progress_pct
GET /api/admin/vault/state additionally returns treasury_goal_eur and eur_usd_rate
POST /api/admin/vault/crack with 50K tokens produces micro-rotations without locking dials
POST /api/admin/vault/crack with 100M tokens locks exactly one additional dial
Sequential 6 cracks of 100M tokens each reach DECLASSIFIED stage
POST /api/admin/vault/config with preset='production' sets correct defaults
POST /api/admin/vault/config with preset='demo' sets fast-crack values
Individual config field updates work correctly
Treasury-based declassification logic fields present and calculated correctly
Hourly tick at production scale stays within reasonable bounds (≤10% of dial)
All previous endpoints still functional (regression test)
Public API correctly hides admin-only fields while exposing allowed fields
